questions.question: List the possible unary relational operations on a relation R over a set of schema attributes A, and explain the effect of each operation on the relation R.
questions.hint: Consider the definitions of unary relational operations and provide examples for each operation

questions.question: Given the relation R = {(1, 'John', 25), (2, 'Mary', 31), (3, 'Bob', 42)}, find the minimum salary using the unary relational operation MIN on the relation R. Express your answer in the required format.
questions.hint: Use the MIN operation to find the smallest value in the salary column of the relation R

questions.question: Consider the relation R = {(1, 'John', 'A'), (2, 'Mary', 'B'), (3, 'Bob', 'A')}. List the groups of names that have the same first letter, using the unary relational operation GROUP BY on the relation R. Express your answer in the required format.
questions.hint: Use the GROUP BY operation to group the names by their first letter and list the resulting groups
